@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(auth_mw_expiry_boundary)
C: expMs<nowMs ∧ allow ∧ skew30
P: skew30 ∧ boundary ∧ refresh_loop
V: edge(-30s_200)
A: min_fix ∧ reg_test

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(auth_mw_expiry_boundary).
Constraints: expMs<nowMs and allow and 30-second grace window.
Plan: 30-second grace window and boundary and refresh_loop.
Verify: edge(-30s_200).
Answer target: min_fix and reg_test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(refresh_token_409_race)
C: reuse(old_refresh_token)=>409∧reject_replay_once
P: parallel_refresh_race∧duplicates_409_loop
V: edge(-30s_200)
A: reg_t

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(refresh_token_409_race).
Constraints: reuse(old_refresh_token) implies 409 and reject_replay_once.
Plan: parallel_refresh_race and duplicates_409_loop.
Verify: edge(-30s_200).
Answer target: regression test.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(webhook: edge timestamp rejects valid requests)

P: edge_timestamp_rejects_valid_webhook ∧ min_fix_reg_test

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(oauth): normalize timestamp units in expiry check
C: exp<now ∧ normalize_ms_sec_once
P: ms_sec_mismatch ∧ rejects_fresh_token
V: "1000" ∧ "401"

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(boundary_stale_loop)

P: stale_loop∧revalidate_forever∧min_fix

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(boundary_stale_loop).
Constraints: age>=ttl and exact_boundary.
Plan: stale_loop and revalidate_forever and min_fix.
Verify: ttl and 304.
Answer target: verify.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(limiter_reset_edge_retry_storm)

P: retry_storm_at_reset_edge∧min_fix

A: reg_

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix(limiter_reset_edge_retry_storm).
Constraints: now>reset and release_exactly_at_reset_once.
Plan: retry_storm_at_reset_edge and min_fix.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: fix(auth): preserve healthcheck bypass for public ping
C: !session∧public_ping∧healthcheck_bypass
P: null_session∧breaks_route∧public_ping_fail
V: "401"∧"session"
A: minimal_fix
